title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Paytm - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Paytm - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
